name: Trondheim Golfklubb

course.viewDescription: Sommersætra i Bymarka; idyllisk utsikt over byen.
course.viewDescription_en: Sommersaetra in Bymarka; idyllic views over the city.

description: 'Norges vakreste 9-hullsbane' i Bymarka med 18 ulike tee-posisjoner.

2025.greenFeeDescription: 9 hull: Voksen (30+) 350 kr, Ung-voksen (19-29) 300 kr, Junior (t.o.m. 19) 250 kr. Ukegreenfee 1500 kr, Månedsgreenfee 4000 kr.
2025.notes: Golf Total 995 kr/mnd: ubegrenset spill på Trondheim og Stjørdal GK. Forhåndsbetaling ved booking i GolfBox. Gjester kan booke 3 dager i forveien.
2025.greenFeeDescription_en: 9 holes: Adult (30+) 350 kr, Young Adult (19-29) 300 kr, Junior (up to 19) 250 kr. Weekly green fee 1,500 kr, Monthly green fee 4,000 kr.
2025.notes_en: Golf Total 995 kr/month: unlimited play at Trondheim and Stjoerdal GC. Advance payment when booking in GolfBox. Guests can book 3 days in advance.

2026.greenFeeDescription: 9 hull: Voksen (30+) 350 kr, Ung-voksen (19-29) 300 kr, Junior (t.o.m. 19) 250 kr. Ukegreenfee 1500 kr, Månedsgreenfee 4000 kr.
2026.notes: Golf Total 995 kr/mnd: ubegrenset spill på Trondheim og Stjørdal GK. Forhåndsbetaling ved booking i GolfBox. Gjester kan booke 3 dager i forveien. 2026 priser ikke offisielt publisert ennå, bruker 2025-priser.
2026.greenFeeDescription_en: 9 holes: Adult (30+) 350 kr, Young Adult (19-29) 300 kr, Junior (up to 19) 250 kr. Weekly green fee 1,500 kr, Monthly green fee 4,000 kr.
2026.notes_en: Golf Total 995 kr/month: unlimited play at Trondheim and Stjoerdal GC. Advance payment when booking in GolfBox. Guests can book 3 days in advance. 2026 prices not officially published yet, using 2025 prices.

2026.description: Under 12 år. Kan være med foreldre/foresatte ut på banen eller treningsfeltet.
2026.description_en: Under 12 years. May accompany parents/guardians on the course or practice area.

2026.description: 12-19 år. Full spillerett. Kan deles opp i rater.
2026.description_en: 12-19 years. Full playing rights. Can be paid in instalments.

2026.description: Født 2000-2006. Full spillerett. Kan deles opp i rater.
2026.description_en: Born 2000-2006. Full playing rights. Can be paid in instalments.

2026.description: Født 1997-1999. Full spillerett. Kan deles opp i rater.
2026.description_en: Born 1997-1999. Full playing rights. Can be paid in instalments.

2026.description: 30 år eller eldre. Full spillerett 7 dager i uka.
2026.description_en: 30 years or older. Full playing rights 7 days a week.

2026.description: Maks 2 voksne + 2 juniorer/barn i samme husstand. Kan deles opp i rater.
2026.description_en: Max 2 adults + 2 juniors/children in the same household. Can be paid in instalments.

2026.description: Spillerett før kl 15:00 på ukedager (man-fre). Må betale greenfee i helg/helligdag. Kan delta i klubbturneringer uten greenfee.
2026.description_en: Playing rights before 15:00 on weekdays (Mon-Fri). Must pay green fee at weekends/public holidays. May participate in club tournaments without green fee.

2026.description: For de som er usikre på spillemengde. Må betale greenfee for å spille. Inkluderer 1 greenfee.
2026.description_en: For those unsure about how much they will play. Must pay green fee to play. Includes 1 green fee.

2026.description: Ubegrenset spill på både Trondheim og Stjørdal GK.
2026.description_en: Unlimited play at both Trondheim and Stjoerdal GC.

meta.notes: Norway's most beautiful 9-hole course. Established 1950. Located in Bymarka with views over Trondheim. Golf Total joint membership with Stjørdal GK available.

description_en: 'Norway's most beautiful 9-hole course' in Bymarka with 18 different tee positions.
